subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Creator of the heavens and the Sovereign of Names, worthy and deserving is He of the world's exaltation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد فاطر سما و مالک اسما را لایق و سزا که مدح عالم بر مقامش
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @personal instructions, @call to action
